title: MENTALLY OVERCOMING CHALLENGES AND ADVERSITY SAFELINE - 211info
text: NATIONAL RUNAWAY SAFELINE MENTALLY OVERCOMING CHALLENGES AND ADVERSITY SAFELINE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a safe space for crisis intervention, discussion about mental health challenges and assistance connecting with resources. Hotline is staffed by trained professionals and calls may remain anonymous. 4849 N Milwaukee Avenue Suite 700 Chicago, IL 60630 Eligibility: Ages 12-24 Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (888) 504-6622 1-888-504 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Hotline (888) 504-6622 1-888-504-MOCA Text Short Code 66008 MOCA Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, text, or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Mental Health Crisis Lines * Youth Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - NATIONAL RUNAWAY SAFELINE TRANSPORTATION - HOME FREE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
